summary: Brute-force pattern detected: repeated failed EHR logins within the correlation window targeting user clinicshared from 10.10.20.102 against /login.
recommended_next_steps: Determine whether there was any successful login for clinicshared during/after the failure burst (possible compromise).
Validate whether 10.10.20.102 is expected for this account; check for similar failures against other usernames (spray behavior).
Containment: temporarily lock/reset clinicshared if activity is not expected; consider blocking 10.10.20.102 at the firewall if suspicious.
Scope: review other related alerts from the same source or targeting other accounts in the same timeframe.
Document timeline and preserve Wazuh evidence (screenshots/exports) for reporting.
analyst_notes: Treat as incident-likely until verified as user error (e.g., repeated mistyping).
